snp2.11:2.0.337: "Pañca kāmaguṇe hitvā,piyarūpe manorame;Saddhāya gharā nikkhamma,dukkhassantakaro bhava.
snp2.11:2.0.338: Mitte bhajassu kalyāṇe,pantañca sayanāsanaṁ;Vivittaṁ appanigghosaṁ,mattaññū hohi bhojane.
snp2.11:2.0.339: Cīvare piṇḍapāte ca,paccaye sayanāsane;Etesu taṇhaṁ mākāsi,mā lokaṁ punarāgami.
snp2.11:2.0.340: Saṁvuto pātimokkhasmiṁ,indriyesu ca pañcasu;Sati kāyagatā tyatthu,nibbidābahulo bhava.
